parameters.query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=true AND hidden=false)::int as active_listings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE moderated=false AND hidden=false)::int as pending_moderation,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace WHERE quantity=0 AND hidden=false AND moderated=true)::int as out_of_stock_visible,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='fulfilled')::int as stuck_fulfilled,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='completed' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '30 days')::int as completed_30d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='completed' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '7 days')::int as completed_7d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE status='completed' AND created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours')::int as completed_today,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '7 days')::int as orders_7d,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_order WHERE created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '24 hours')::int as orders_24h,
  (SELECT COALESCE(moderated, false) FROM marketplace WHERE id=2067417 LIMIT 1) as re_requiem_moderated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM marketplace_review WHERE created_at > NOW()-INTERVAL '7 days')::int as new_reviews_7d,
  TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'DD.MM.YYYY HH24:MI') as checked_at
SELECT * FROM input1 JOIN input2 ON TRUE

INSERT INTO ai_manager_context (manager_id, context_data, updated_at) VALUES ('{{ $json.manager_id }}', '{{ $json.context_json }}'::jsonb, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (manager_id) DO UPDATE SET context_data = EXCLUDED.context_data, updated_at = NOW()

parameters.text:
🤖 *WF-014: AI Manager контекст обновлён*

📅 {{ $now.toFormat('dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm') }} UTC
✅ 4 менеджера синхронизированы

📊 *Источники:*
• PostgreSQL — метрики каталога и заказов
• GA4 — revenue и трафик (3 периода)
• GSC — топ поисковые запросы

_Следующее обновление через 24ч_
